# Tech Stack

## Frontend
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Create React App (`react-scripts`)
- AG Grid (`ag-grid-community`, `ag-grid-react`)
- Axios for HTTP requests
- CSS via CRA defaults plus inline component style objects
- `react-dom` `createPortal` for snackbar/menu overlay rendering

## Backend
- Node.js runtime
- Express web server
- CORS middleware
- TypeScript for backend source
- `ts-node` and `nodemon` for local dev execution

## Tooling
- npm package manager
- `package.json`-driven scripts in `/frontend` and `/backend`
- TypeScript compiler configuration in `/backend/tsconfig.json`
- Jest DOM integration in `/frontend/src/setupTests.ts`
